task: Phase 19 v0.1.19 — auto version bump via commit-and-tag-version (D2). Replace manual version edits with 1-CLI bump that auto-runs codegen:version + release:check + writes CHANGELOG entry + git commit + tag.

stories.title: Install commit-and-tag-version + .versionrc.json config
acceptanceCriteria: bun add -D commit-and-tag-version installed (devDependency in package.json).

.versionrc.json exists at repo root with: types config (feat/fix sections, chore hidden), header preserved, postbump hook chains codegen:version + release:check, bumpFiles array covers package.json + .claude-plugin/plugin.json + .claude-plugin/marketplace.json (path + jsonpath).

stories.title: Dry-run release verifies bumpFiles + postbump chain
acceptanceCriteria: bun run release -- --dry-run executes successfully without modifying files.
Dry-run output shows next version (0.1.18 → 0.1.19 patch from current commit history).
Dry-run output references all 3 bumpFiles + plans codegen:version + release:check postbump.

stories.title: docs/RELEASE.md updated — D2 primary path + manual fallback
acceptanceCriteria: docs/RELEASE.md 'Cutting a release' section rewritten — bun run release primary path + bun run release -- --release-as <ver|minor|major> for explicit choice + manual edit fallback preserved at bottom.
Step-by-step recipe documents: 1. ensure clean working tree, 2. bun run release [-- --release-as X], 3. git push origin main --tags, 4. release.yml fires automatically.
Hotfix workflow documented (urgent fix mid-Phase): bun run release -- --release-as patch + push.

stories.title: Phase 19 ship — v0.1.19 via the new automation itself (dogfood)
acceptanceCriteria: bun run release executed (auto-bump from current commits → 0.1.18 → 0.1.19 patch).
Generated CHANGELOG entry inspected — Phase 19 narrative paragraph (해요체) added by author below the auto-bullets.
git tag v0.1.19 + git push origin main --tags ships release.
GitHub release v0.1.19 published with 5 cross-arch binaries.

metadata.task_origin: /ralph 그렇게 진행해 — D2 commit-and-tag-version per ralplan recommendation (vs D1 release-please overkill for solo + Korean narrative).
metadata.scope_note: D2 chosen over D1 release-please per ralplan analysis: bot-PR rubber-stamp re-introduces v0.1.14 stale-binary trust-without-verify drift; release-please optimizes for weekly cadence (axhub does daily ship-day batches); Korean CHANGELOG narrative needs human author. D2 reuses Phase 16 release:check invariant via postbump hook.
metadata.verification_note: Phase 19 release automation is implemented on main: commit-and-tag-version config, release script, codegen/release-check chain, and v0.1.19 metadata are present.
